params.accountAgeDays: Days since account was first opened
params.prevUtilizationBps: Utilization 7 days ago in bps (for volatility calc)

aggregateHealthFactor(uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Aggregate health factor across Aave + Compound, scaled 1e18.

borrowRateBps(uint256,uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Variable rate model — returns borrow rate in bps/year.

computeCreditScore(uint256,uint256,uint2.notice: Compute a credit score (0–1000) from raw user metrics.

initialize().notice: Called once after deployment — sets the deployer as owner.

maxLtvBps(uint256).notice: Max LTV in bps for a given risk tier.

riskTierFromScore(uint256).notice: Derive risk tier (0–3) from a credit score.

scoreBreakdown(uint256,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Full breakdown of score components for frontend display.

setAuthorised(address,bool).notice: Authorise or de-authorise a caller (e.g. CreditManager).
